description: Bundled rules that aren't ready for default-enabled status. Opt-in by copying entries into compass-rules.json (or, in v0.1+, by enabling them via configuration). Each rule here records the prerequisite that must be met before it graduates to bundled.

rules.reason: No session goal set. Setting one keeps work coherent — call set_goal first.
rules._graduation_prerequisite: Goal-anchor skill exists and set_goal is a natural reflex at session start. Without it, this rule fires PAUSE on the first edit of every session and produces 'turn this off' friction. Re-evaluate at v0.1+ once goal-anchor skill ships and dogfood shows users reaching for set_goal naturally.
rules._first_pulled_reason: Pre-dogfood. The PAUSE classification fires on every uninitialized session, which is the realistic state for the first weeks of any user's relationship with the tool. Friction outweighs signal until the goal-anchor reflex exists.
